summary: Campaign Journey feature testing completed. Backend API and Frontend UI verified. 5/6 backend tests pass. Frontend shows collapsed campaigns by default, expandable timeline with correct status indicators (SENT/NEXT UP), and working modal with Copy Message and Mark as Sent buttons.

minor.issue: Mark-sent endpoint only updates existing messages_sent entries. If step has status='next' (no messages_sent entry yet), the update does nothing. Status remains 'next' after calling mark-sent.
minor.details: The endpoint uses MongoDB positional operator ($) to update messages_sent.$.status but this only works if a messages_sent entry for that step already exists. For steps with 'next' status, no messages_sent entry exists yet, so the update is a no-op.

action_items: Fix mark-sent endpoint to handle steps that don't have messages_sent entry yet. Should use $push to add new entry if step not found, or use $upsert pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: contacts.py L1450-1457: Update query uses 'messages_sent.step': step_num filter but won't match if no messages_sent entry exists for that step. Need to add fallback $push logic.
contacts.py L1295-1433: Campaign journey endpoint correctly returns enrollment_id, campaign_id, pending_send_id, full_message fields in steps.

CampaignJourney.tsx: Correctly implements collapsed-by-default behavior (line 70 - empty expanded state), tappable headers for expand/collapse, modal with Copy Message and Mark as Sent buttons using native HTML buttons for iOS Safari compatibility.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* campaigns and contacts created/cleaned during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign Journey feature mostly working. Key functionality verified: (1) Campaigns collapsed by default, (2) Tappable headers expand/collapse timeline, (3) Steps show correct status (SENT with green, NEXT UP with orange), (4) Modal opens with full message, Copy Message and Mark as Sent buttons. One backend issue: mark-sent doesn't work for 'next' status steps that don't have a messages_sent entry yet - needs to add entry instead of just updating.

backend.campaign_journey_endpoint: GET /api/contacts/{uid}/{cid}/campaign-journey - PASS - Returns enrollment_id, pending_send_id, full_message
backend.mark_sent_endpoint: POST /api/contacts/{uid}/{cid}/campaign-journey/mark-sent - PARTIAL - Works for existing messages_sent, fails for 'next' status steps
backend.legacy_cross_reference: PASS - Journey correctly cross-references task/pending_send status

frontend.collapsed_by_default: PASS - Campaign cards show collapsed with chevron-down
frontend.tappable_header: PASS - Clicking campaign name expands/collapses timeline
frontend.pending_step_styling: PASS - 'NEXT UP' shows in orange with scheduled time
frontend.sent_step_styling: PASS - 'SENT' shows in green with timestamp
frontend.step_modal: PASS - Tapping step opens modal with full message, Copy Message, Mark as Sent buttons
frontend.native_html_buttons: PASS - Uses <button> elements for iOS Safari compatibility
